/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++  -Wall -Wextra -O2 -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/imu_reader_cpp.dir/examples/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imu_reader_cpp.dir/src/drivers/serial_port.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imu_reader_cpp.dir/src/protocol/frame/imu_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imu_reader_cpp.dir/src/drivers/imu_reader.cpp.o -o imu_reader_cpp  motors_build/libMYACTUA_EtherCat.a -lm -lpthread -lethercat -lrt -lpthread
